--- layout: default title: Curriculum Vitae cv: download_links: - [PDF, assets/files/cv-{{ 'now' | date: '%Y%m%d' }}.pdf] --- {% assign cv = site.data.cv %} {% assign config = page.cv %}
{% if config.download_links %} {% for item in config.download_links %}  {{item[0]}}{% endfor %} {% endif %}

{{cv.name}}

{{cv.tagline}}
  {{cv.email}}   {{cv.phone}}   {{cv.website}}   {{cv.location}}
{% for sec_id in cv.sections %} {% assign section = cv.data[sec_id] %}

{{section.title}}

{{ section.text | markdownify }} {% for item in section.items %} {% for keyvalue in item %}
{{keyvalue[0]}}:
{{keyvalue[1] | markdownify}}
{% endfor %} {% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
